derivationSources.all: JSONL session map compiled in workspace/learnings.md (Phase 1 bootstrap — tier-3 timestamps, union applied for concurrent sessions 4–7)

actuals.note: Phase 1 baseline — no prior estimate; seeds normalisation table

flowFindings.hypothesis: Sessions 4–7 ran concurrently across 4 parallel chat windows; outer loop phases are stateless per story and trivially parallelisable
flowFindings.improvement: Model outer loop phases as parallelisable; 4-window ceiling compresses review+test-plan+DoR to ~5h calendar for up to ~8 stories

flowFindings.topic: Inner loop is dispatch-and-merge, not attended
flowFindings.hypothesis: With strong DoR quality, agents run through implementation autonomously; human involvement is dispatch + PR merge only
flowFindings.improvement: Revise E1 inner loop estimate to ~1h human regardless of story count (6–8 story features); DoR quality is the bottleneck, not story count
